spec_match.rationale: Wave, circular arc, and triangle use matching path() values for shape-outside and clip-path.

interactive.rationale: All three shape controls update the path, visible contour, wrapping geometry, and pressed state.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page demonstrates text following path() contours and identifies rectangular fallback separately.

edge_cases.rationale: Exact CSS.supports capability detection explains fallback without relying on the browser version.

references.rationale: ChromeStatus and MDN shape-outside references are present.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Desktop screenshots for wave, circle, and triangle show each float on the right with text following the left contour and no overlap.

accessibility.rationale: Shape buttons expose aria-pressed and labels remain readable inside centered clipped shapes.

design_system.rationale: The repaired right-anchored examples use the shared bordered paper treatment and readable path output.

summary: Aligned every shape on the right, so the visible contour faces the text consistently. Added exact support messaging, pressed states, centered labels, and visual verification for every shape.
